title: funcy's better slab breaking
description: A spigot plugin that allows users to break the bottom half of slabs easier!
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/jQsFnJ7.png)

This Plugin allows you to break individual slabs from double slabs! If you sneak you'll break the bottom slab!

**Note: This plugin is in it's public beta stage, please report bugs and/or suggestions to my [discord](https://discord.gg/CQ9BfSKjy8)**

# Showcase:
![showcasebreak1](https://i.imgur.com/dnIIaD7.gif)
